items.claim: Anna Melissano's striking is clean and she possesses an elusive style.
items.quote: Her striking's clean... She's got a kickboxing background. She's elusive in the striking department.

items.claim: Anna Melissano was outworked on the ground and on the feet during her time on The Ultimate Fighter.
items.quote: she clearly got outworked on the ground and on the feet around was her fight on the Ultimate Fighter.

items.claim: Dion Barbosa is a grappling specialist who will be able to outgrapple Anna Melissano.
items.quote: Dion Barbosa is kind of a grappling specialist. And I think this is a hard short notice debut for Bandana. Anna, I'm going Dioni Barbosa to outgrapple her.

items.claim: Dion Barbosa is a natural flyweight while Anna Melissano is a strawweight, creating a size disadvantage for Melissano.
items.quote: Barbosa is jacked and physical and strong. She's a real flyweight whereas Bandana Anna is definitely a straw weight... moving up in weight, I think it's a terrible matchup.

items.claim: Anna Melissano possesses a high-level straight right hand.
items.quote: She's got a decent straight cross. It's like when do you see ladies with a good straight right hand? She's got that in spades.

items.claim: Alvin Hines previously competed while using performance-enhancing drugs.
items.quote: Alvin Hines is coming off steroids

items.claim: RJ Harris has a significant physical advantage with a 6'6" frame and 80-inch reach.
items.quote: He's 6'6 with an 80 inch reach. This is a massive heavyweight.

items.claim: Alvin Hines is defensively vulnerable and gets hit frequently.
